scripts.test:api:store: newman run store.collection.json --environment store.environment.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:3000 --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-report/store.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Store API Newman Report"
scripts.test:api:petstore: newman run petstore.collection.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-report/petstore.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Petstore API Newman Report"
scripts.test:api: npm run test:api:store && npm run test:api:petstore && npm run generate-dashboard
